name: Al and Tipper Gore's Chinese Chicken with Walnuts
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken into 1-inch pieces and set aside.
2. Mix the soy sauce and water, then blend into the cornstarch; stir in the sherry, sugar, ginger, red pepper, and salt.
3. Preheat a wok or large skillet over high heat; add 2 teaspoons of peanut oil. Stir-fry the green peppers and onions for 2 minutes and remove.
4. Add the walnuts and stir-fry for 1 to 2 minutes until golden brown. Remove.
5. Add the rest of the oil and stir-fry half of the chicken for 2 minutes.
6. Return all the chicken to the wok and stir in the soy mixture. Cook and stir until bubbly.
7. Stir in the vegetables and walnuts, cover, and cook for 1 minute.
